name: Prizma Pres Matbaacilik Yayincilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Prizma Pres Matbaacilik Yayincilik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. provides printing services. The company prints courses and supplementary textbooks, children's stories and tale books, and question bank and test books. It also engages in various printing works. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
